name: RPlog_A_Request_for_Assistance
title: A Request for Assistance
summary: With the Corporate Sector ablaze in speculation after recent upheaval, the resigned official Smitherbodkins keeps a low profile and meets privately with the CSA executive Miranda Jabs aboard the station Theseus. He confirms the arrival of a shipment of sedative, and the two trade careful talk about the disgraced former CEO G. S. Qwynt VIII and the teams Jabs has dispatched to track down loose ends. After a series of suspenseful pauses, Smitherbodkins reveals the reason he resigned his post and the leverage behind it -- the former CEO's ruinous, unpayable bet at the House of Sabacc. He then steers toward his true aim: a larger, more personal ambition that Jabs recognizes the value of, even as it risks ceding a world to the New Republic. The meeting closes with Jabs offering Smitherbodkins her full assistance in getting settled, and the two parting on terms of mutual, scheming courtesy.
